motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def maximumOr(self, nums: List[int], k: int) -> int:
        nums.sort(reverse=True)
        for i in range(k):
            if nums[0] % 2 == 0:
                nums[0] //= 2
                nums[0] *= 3
            else:
                nums[-1] //= 2
                nums[-1] *= 3
            nums.sort(reverse=True)
        return nums[0] | nums[1]
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n log n + k log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: MEDIUM
